hero_subtitle: Lawyer specializing in criminal, civil, administrative, and commercial (economic) cases.
about_text:
Legal protection can be complex without professional support. If you have faced unfair treatment and do not know where to begin, timely action is essential.

Since March 2021, INTERNATIONAL LEGAL ADVISOR has been providing qualified legal services to individuals and businesses. An individual approach and clear communication ensure effective solutions for cases of any complexity.

Legal proceedings require not only expertise but also strategy. I explain your rights, guide you through every stage, and help you make informed decisions.

Balanced and effective — the foundation of my work. Contact me for a consultation.
criminal_desc: Defense of suspects and the accused, as well as representation of victims’ interests. Legal assistance at the pre-investigation, investigation, and trial stages.
civil_desc: Resolution of property, contractual, family, and inheritance disputes. Comprehensive handling of cases of any complexity.
administrative_desc: Challenging decisions and actions of public authorities, protection of rights and interests in administrative disputes.
economic_desc: Legal support for business activities, resolution of commercial and corporate disputes, representation of business interests in court.
reviews_title: Your feedback on working with the lawyer
reviews_additional: Would you like to add anything?
footer_description: Protection of interests, provision of legal assistance, business support, and litigation practice.
